description: A newly assembled vehicle has failed the EOL diagnostic test for an ABS fault.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the EOL test failure alert and identify the specific DTC.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives alert for VIN ending in 12345 with DTC C1155 - 'Wheel Speed Sensor LF Input Circuit Failure'.

nodes.task_description: Log the defect and route the vehicle to the on-site rectification center.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the defect and updates the vehicle's routing.

nodes.task_description: Assign a technician to diagnose and repair the fault.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a repair order and assigns it to a technician in the rectification center.
